titleEn: Chile to export 530,000 tons of citrus in 2026
contentHtml: Chile is projected to export 530,000 tons of citrus this season, a 6% increase over the previous period. The United States remains the primary market, accounting for about 80% of shipments. By variety, mandarins lead the supply at an estimated 190,000 tons, followed by oranges at 134,000 tons and lemons…
